name: Crockpot Chicken and Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 9 oz. package frozen cut green beans
recipeInstructions:
DUMPLINGS:
1/3 cup yellow cornmeal
2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley
1/2 cup sliced celery
1/2 cup chopped onion
1/2 teaspoon salt
1 1/4 cups biscuit baking mix
1 cup shredded American cheese
2/3 cup milk
1. Place the frozen green beans in a strainer and rinse with hot water to thaw.
Transfer the thawed beans, chicken, potatoes, chicken broth, V-8 juice, celery, onion, chili powder, salt, and hot pepper sauce into the crockpot. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours. If needed, switch to high heat until bubbling.
2. In a bowl, combine the biscuit mix, cornmeal, half of the cheese, parsley. Add milk and stir until just moistened. Spoon the mixture over the stew in the crockpot, cover, and cook an additional 2-1/2 hours (do not remove the lid). Sprinkle remaining cheese on top of the dumplings.
